title: ononis monophylla f. trifoliata
intro: Ononis monophylla f. trifoliata, also known as the three-leaved spiny restharrow, is a flowering plant species within the legume family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and astringent, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ononis monophylla f. trifoliata include its potential to alleviate symptoms of diarrhea, coughs, and sore throats, while also being used as a treatment for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
